sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16159" key="a)shmokle/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσημοκλέπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thief of plate,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.360</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
